description: An advanced-concepts engineer must build a Blended Wing Body (BWB) aircraft configuration from a specification document. The specification file is located at /home/ga/Desktop/bwb_spec.txt. Read that file first to obtain the required geometry parameters. Then, in OpenVSP, create a new model containing: (1) a multi-section Wing component representing the blended wing and center body, matching the span, chords, and sweeps in the spec, and (2) twin vertical fins (using Wing components oriented vertically) positioned on the outer wing. Do NOT use any Fuselage or Pod components (a BWB has no conventional tube fuselage). Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/bwb_concept.vsp3. The specification uses metric units.
